items.title: Paths and project trees: correct the failure model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this documented beginner mistake? Every relative path starts from the repository root, regardless of the terminal's current working directory.

examEligibility.rationale: The deterministic answer and rubric are AI-assisted draft content awaiting independent human approval.

hints: Compare both options with the canonical model, declared boundary, and observable evidence in the lesson.

feedback.correct: Correct. Inspect the working directory first, resolve each segment from that location, and quote paths as data according to the active shell's rules.
feedback.incorrect: The selected statement preserves the documented misconception. Inspect the working directory first, resolve each segment from that location, and quote paths as data according to the active shell's rules.

options.text: Inspect the working directory first, resolve each segment from that location, and quote paths as data according to the active shell's rules.
